issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 INFINITI Q50. THE CONTACT STATED WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 70 MPH, THE VEHICLE JERKED, SHIFTED GEARS, REDUCED SPEED, THE ODOMETER FLASHED, THE CHECK ENGINE WARNING LIGHT ILLUMINATED, AND THE HEATING AND AIR CONDITIONING SYSTEM WENT FROM COLD TO HOT.

THE VEHICLE SUDDENLY PULLS VERY HARD TO THE RIGHT REQUIRING FORCE TO KEEP IN A STRAIGHT LINE.  THE VEHICLE DID NOT EXPERIENCE ANY ALIGNMENT ALTERING POTHOLES OR ROAD BUMPS.  THIS IS A DANGEROUS SOFTWARE MALFUNCTION WITH THE DAS. I AM VERY LUCKY THIS OCCURRED AT LOW SPEED AND WITH

CAME TO A SLOW STOP AT A RED LIGHT IN MY 2015 INFINITI Q50. MY FOOT WAS DIRECTLY ON THE BRAKE. WITHIN SECONDS THE CAR BEGAN TO PULL FORWARD AND I APPLIED ADDITIONAL PRESSURE ON THE BRAKES BY USING BOTH FEET. THE ENGINE WAS RACING OUT OF CONTROL AND THE TIRES WERE SCREECHING. SIFT

HI, I PURCHASED THIS VEHICLE AT 7/31/2015. IT'S A BRAND NEW Q50 2015 PREMIUM. I MET TWO ISSUES ABOUT IT: 1. IT'S PASSENGER AIR BAG. THE PASSENGER AIR BAG STATUS LIGHT IS ON WITH AN ADULT OCCUPYING THE FRONT PASSENGER SEAT FOR THE FIRST A FEW MINUTES, SOMETIMES IS 2 MINS, SOMETIME

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 INFINITI Q50. WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 40 MPH, THE VEHICLE LOST POWER AND CRASHED INTO A GUARDRAIL. THERE WERE NO WARNING INDICATORS ILLUMINATED BEFORE THE FAILURE. THE VEHICLE WAS TOWED TO AN INDEPENDENT MECHANIC. THE CONTACT SUSTAINED MINOR INJURI

narrative.headline: What 2015 Infiniti Q50 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 120 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (31% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 INFINITI Q50. THE CONTACT STATED WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 70 MPH, THE VEHICLE JERKED, SHIFTED GEARS, REDUCED SPEED, THE ODOMETER FLASHED, THE CHECK ENGINE WARNING LIGHT ILLUMINATED, AND THE HEATING AND AIR CONDITIONING SYSTEM WENT FROM COLD TO HOT.
